musicInfo.song_name: hate that i made you love me

latestPosts.caption:
These @amazonaustralia finds make cleaning so much easier (and satisfying lol) 🤭✨

Comment PRIME and I’ll send all the products straight to your DMs! Most of them are on really good sale too 😍

1. Window cleaner & vacuum – one of my absolute favourite combos. I’ve used these for years and haven’t looked back! They leave the perfect streak free finish. I use them on mirrors, windows and shower glass. I like to put dish soap & vinegar in mine.

2. Handheld scrubber – another favourite that I’ve used for years. Think anywhere that needs a scrub… just use this instead. 😂 Minimal effort with maximum results. ✨

3. Spot cleaner – a must if you have kids or pets! It’s so good for accidental spills or stubborn stains that won’t come off with a simple wipe. I honestly couldn’t own fabric chairs or couches without it. 🤣

4. Steam cleaner – my favourite for deep cleaning the kitchen. It melts away grease and grime, saving so much time. No scrubbing needed… just steam & wipe!

5. Damp duster – perfect for grabbing dust instead of spreading it around. I love using it on skirting boards, blinds, shutters and other dusty surfaces.

6. Wet & dry vacuum – a total game changer. Being able to vacuum and mop at the same time saves so much time. No more dragging around a traditional mop and bucket!

#amazonfinds @amazonaustralia

One of our favourite quick & easy family meals 🤤 

Sticky Honey Garlic Chicken

Ingredients

Chicken

* 700g chicken breast, cut into bite-sized pieces
* 1 tbsp olive oil
* Salt & pepper

Sticky Honey Garlic Sauce

* ¼ cup soy sauce
* 2 tbsp honey
* 1 tbsp brown sugar
* 3 garlic cloves minced
* 1 tbsp white vinegar (optional we do without)
* 1 tsp sesame oil
* 1 tbsp cornflour
* 2 tbsp water

To Serve

* Steamed rice of choice
* Broccoli or broccolini is always yum with it
* Sesame seeds 
* Sliced spring onion 
* sweet chilli sauce (optional but elite)

#dinner #dinnerideas #easyrecipe #cooking

Been wanting a machine washable rug for so long! Especially since getting Bonnie 🤭 found the perfect one from @missamaraloves this one is the Cabanela Cream and Beige Distressed Washable Rug, it’s machine washable, pet friendly & stain resistant 😍 plus it’s extremely soft like a blanket 🤣☁️ loved the Dayna rug but definitely needed something I can deep clean every few months 🙌🏽

Gifted

#loungeroom #rug #livingroom

With two kids, a puppy & Jeremy 🤪🤣 keeping the floors clean is a full time job 😅 The @roborockau Qrevo Edge 2 is a game changer!! Especially if you have pets that shed a lot or constantly have long hair all over the floor, the main brush & flexi arm arc side brush works in sync to capture hair up to 40cm long, with a 100% hair removal rate and 0% hair tangling rate 👏🏽

@roborockau #QrevoEdge2 #gifted #CleaningHacks #BusyMumLife #DogMum
